thesis: Juniper Networks is positioned to capture routing and switching demand for AI inference clusters and edge deployment; optical networking themes dominate SEC filings (12 mentions) and the shift from training to inference workloads requires high-throughput, low-latency interconnects.
reasoning: Juniper Networks is positioned to capture routing and switching demand for AI inference clusters and edge deployment; optical networking themes dominate SEC filings (12 mentions) and the shift from training to inference workloads requires high-throughput, low-latency interconnects.
